canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>labyrinth</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { background: #0a0a0f; overflow: hidden; }
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H, cols, rows, cellSize, grid, stack, current;
let phase = 'generate'; // generate, solve, pause, reset
let solution = [];
let visited = [];
let queue = [];
let parent = {};
let solveIndex = 0;
let pauseTimer = 0;
let mouseX = -1000, mouseY = -1000;

// Audio
const audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
let audioStarted = false;

function playTick(freq = 800, duration = 0.02, vol = 0.03) {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  osc.frequency.value = freq;
  osc.type = 'square';
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + duration);
}

function playSolve() {
  if (!audioStarted) return;
  const notes = [261.63, 329.63, 392.00, 523.25]; // C major arpeggio
  notes.forEach((freq, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
      const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
      osc.connect(gain);
      gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
      osc.frequency.value = freq;
      osc.type = 'triangle';
      gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.08, audioCtx.currentTime);
      gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
      osc.start();
      osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.3);
    }, i * 80);
  });
}

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  cellSize = Math.floor(Math.min(W, H) / 40);
  cols = Math.floor(W / cellSize);
  rows = Math.floor(H / cellSize);
  initMaze();
}

function initMaze() {
  grid = [];
  for (let y = 0; y < rows; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < cols; x++) {
      grid.push({
        x, y,
        walls: [true, true, true, true], // top, right, bottom, left
        visited: false,
        inSolution: false,
        solveVisited: false,
        glow: 0
      });
    }
  }
  stack = [];
  current = grid[0];
  current.visited = true;
  phase = 'generate';
  solution = [];
  visited = [];
  queue = [];
  parent = {};
  solveIndex = 0;
  pauseTimer = 0;
}

function index(x, y) {
  if (x < 0 || y < 0 || x >= cols || y >= rows) return -1;
  return x + y * cols;
}

function getUnvisitedNeighbors(cell) {
  const neighbors = [];
  const { x, y } = cell;
  const top = grid[index(x, y - 1)];
  const right = grid[index(x + 1, y)];
  const bottom = grid[index(x, y + 1)];
  const left = grid[index(x - 1, y)];
  if (top && !top.visited) neighbors.push(top);
  if (right && !right.visited) neighbors.push(right);
  if (bottom && !bottom.visited) neighbors.push(bottom);
  if (left && !left.visited) neighbors.push(left);
  return neighbors;
}

function removeWalls(a, b) {
  const dx = a.x - b.x;
  const dy = a.y - b.y;
  if (dx === 1) { a.walls[3] = false; b.walls[1] = false; }
  if (dx === -1) { a.walls[1] = false; b.walls[3] = false; }
  if (dy === 1) { a.walls[0] = false; b.walls[2] = false; }
  if (dy === -1) { a.walls[2] = false; b.walls[0] = false; }
}

function generateStep() {
  const neighbors = getUnvisitedNeighbors(current);
  if (neighbors.length > 0) {
    const next = neighbors[Math.floor(Math.random() * neighbors.length)];
    stack.push(current);
    removeWalls(current, next);
    current = next;
    current.visited = true;
    playTick(400 + Math.random() * 200, 0.015, 0.02);
  } else if (stack.length > 0) {
    current = stack.pop();
  } else {
    phase = 'solve';
    startSolve();
  }
}

function startSolve() {
  const start = grid[0];
  const end = grid[grid.length - 1];
  queue = [start];
  parent = {};
  parent[`${start.x},${start.y}`] = null;
  start.solveVisited = true;
}

function getPassableNeighbors(cell) {
  const neighbors = [];
  const { x, y, walls } = cell;
  if (!walls[0]) { const n = grid[index(x, y - 1)]; if (n) neighbors.push(n); }
  if (!walls[1]) { const n = grid[index(x + 1, y)]; if (n) neighbors.push(n); }
  if (!walls[2]) { const n = grid[index(x, y + 1)]; if (n) neighbors.push(n); }
  if (!walls[3]) { const n = grid[index(x - 1, y)]; if (n) neighbors.push(n); }
  return neighbors;
}

function solveStep() {
  if (queue.length === 0) return;
  
  const current = queue.shift();
  const end = grid[grid.length - 1];
  
  if (current === end) {
    // Reconstruct path
    let node = end;
    while (node) {
      solution.unshift(node);
      node.inSolution = true;
      const key = `${node.x},${node.y}`;
      const p = parent[key];
      if (p) {
        node = grid[index(p.x, p.y)];
      } else {
        node = null;
      }
    }
    phase = 'reveal';
    solveIndex = 0;
    playSolve();
    return;
  }
  
  const neighbors = getPassableNeighbors(current);
  for (const n of neighbors) {
    const key = `${n.x},${n.y}`;
    if (!n.solveVisited) {
      n.solveVisited = true;
      parent[key] = { x: current.x, y: current.y };
      queue.push(n);
    }
  }
  
  playTick(600, 0.01, 0.01);
}

function revealStep() {
  if (solveIndex < solution.length) {
    solution[solveIndex].glow = 1;
    solveIndex++;
    playTick(800 + solveIndex * 5, 0.03, 0.04);
  } else {
    phase = 'pause';
    pauseTimer = 180; // 3 seconds at 60fps
  }
}

function drawCell(cell) {
  const x = cell.x * cellSize;
  const y = cell.y * cellSize;
  const walls = cell.walls;
  
  // Distance to mouse
  const cx = x + cellSize / 2;
  const cy = y + cellSize / 2;
  const dist = Math.hypot(mouseX - cx, mouseY - cy);
  const proximity = Math.max(0, 1 - dist / (cellSize * 4));
  
  // Background glow for solution path
  if (cell.glow > 0) {
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, cellSize);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 100, 200, ${cell.glow * 0.4})`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, `rgba(100, 255, 255, ${cell.glow * 0.1})`);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fillRect(x, y, cellSize, cellSize);
  }
  
  // Mouse proximity highlight
  if (proximity > 0 && phase !== 'reveal') {
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(100, 255, 255, ${proximity * 0.1})`;
    ctx.fillRect(x, y, cellSize, cellSize);
  }
  
  // Current generation cell
  if (phase === 'generate' && cell === current) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.6)';
    ctx.fillRect(x + 2, y + 2, cellSize - 4, cellSize - 4);
  }
  
  // Solve exploration
  if (phase === 'solve' && cell.solveVisited && !cell.inSolution) {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 255, 255, 0.15)';
    ctx.fillRect(x, y, cellSize, cellSize);
  }
  
  // Walls
  ctx.strokeStyle = cell.visited ? 
    (cell.glow > 0 ? `rgba(255, 150, 220, ${0.6 + cell.glow * 0.4})` : 'rgba(180, 100, 200, 0.6)') : 
    'rgba(60, 40, 80, 0.4)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.lineCap = 'round';
  
  if (walls[0]) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, y); ctx.lineTo(x + cellSize, y); ctx.stroke(); }
  if (walls[1]) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x + cellSize, y); ctx.lineTo(x + cellSize, y + cellSize); ctx.stroke(); }
  if (walls[2]) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x + cellSize, y + cellSize); ctx.lineTo(x, y + cellSize); ctx.stroke(); }
  if (walls[3]) { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x, y + cellSize); ctx.lineTo(x, y); ctx.stroke(); }
}

function drawSolutionPath() {
  if (solution.length < 2) return;
  
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.8)';
  ctx.lineWidth = cellSize * 0.3;
  ctx.lineCap = 'round';
  ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
  
  for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(solveIndex, solution.length); i++) {
    const cell = solution[i];
    const x = cell.x * cellSize + cellSize / 2;
    const y = cell.y * cellSize + cellSize / 2;
    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(x, y);
    else ctx.lineTo(x, y);
  }
  ctx.stroke();
  
  // Cyan glow overlay
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(100, 255, 255, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = cellSize * 0.5;
  ctx.stroke();
}

function drawStartEnd() {
  // Start marker
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(100, 255, 255, 0.8)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.arc(cellSize / 2, cellSize / 2, cellSize * 0.25, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
  
  // End marker
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 100, 200, 0.8)';
  ctx.beginPath();
  const ex = (cols - 0.5) * cellSize;
  const ey = (rows - 0.5) * cellSize;
  ctx.arc(ex, ey, cellSize * 0.25, 0, Math.PI * 2);
  ctx.fill();
}

function update() {
  const stepsPerFrame = phase === 'generate' ? 3 : phase === 'solve' ? 5 : 1;
  
  for (let i = 0; i < stepsPerFrame; i++) {
    if (phase === 'generate') generateStep();
    else if (phase === 'solve') solveStep();
    else if (phase === 'reveal') revealStep();
  }
  
  if (phase === 'pause') {
    pauseTimer--;
    if (pauseTimer <= 0) {
      initMaze();
    }
  }
  
  // Decay glows
  for (const cell of grid) {
    if (cell.glow > 0 && phase === 'pause') {
      // Keep glowing during pause
    }
  }
}

function draw() {
  ctx.fillStyle = '#0a0a0f';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  // Subtle grid backdrop
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(40, 20, 60, 0.3)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let x = 0; x <= W; x += cellSize) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x, 0);
    ctx.lineTo(x, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (let y = 0; y <= H; y += cellSize) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Draw cells
  for (const cell of grid) {
    drawCell(cell);
  }
  
  // Draw solution path
  if (phase === 'reveal' || phase === 'pause') {
    drawSolutionPath();
  }
  
  // Start and end markers
  drawStartEnd();
  
  // Phase indicator
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)';
  ctx.font = '12px monospace';
  const phaseText = phase === 'generate' ? 'carving...' : 
                    phase === 'solve' ? 'searching...' : 
                    phase === 'reveal' ? 'found' : 'contemplating';
  ctx.fillText(phaseText, 10, H - 10);
}

function loop() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

// Events
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
});
canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (!audioStarted) {
    audioCtx.resume();
    audioStarted = true;
  }
  initMaze();
});
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  if (!audioStarted) {
    audioCtx.resume();
    audioStarted = true;
  }
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  initMaze();
});

// Init
resize();
loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
